Notes.Text:
This update for libXfont2 fixes the following issues

- CVE-2026-56001: integer overflow in `BitmapScaleBitmaps` can lead to a heap buffer overflow (bsc#1269018).
- CVE-2026-56002: insufficient checks in `pcfReadFont` can lead to a heap buffer overflow (bsc#1269019).
- CVE-2026-56003: missing bounds check in `ComputeScaledProperties` can lead to a heap buffer overflow (bsc#1269020).
Notes.Title: Details
